subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1914-12-11
subcodes.first_line: Only in America such brilliant ideas are born. This will be a most effective token of America's attitude in the matter of brotherhood... The axis around which the consolation of the hearts revolves is Faith in God.
subcodes.subjects: @nationalism; love of country, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @God as personal vs. impersonal reality, @praise of Western values; culture, @consolation and comfort, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
